text:
## §A2. Gold Plan — Out-of-Pocket Maximum Adjustment

The Gold plan individual Out-of-Pocket Maximum is updated from **$4,000** to **$3,800** effective July 1, 2024, reflecting enhanced cost protections negotiated with the FictiHealth provider network.

## §1. Overview

Gold original overview lists Out-of-Pocket Maximum (individual) as $4,000 before the July amendment.
